articles.title: Postal workers start voting on 5-year contract, strike mandate after labour strife
articles.description: OTTAWA — Canada Post workers start voting today on a five-year contract agreement that follows labour strife and their union leader urging they reject the deal. The 55,000 employees represented by Canadian Union of Postal Workers can vote starting today until May 30 on whether to ratify an agreement

articles.title: Statistics Canada set to report March inflation data
articles.description: OTTAWA — Statistics Canada is set to report fresh inflation data for March this morning. Economists are widely expecting higher gas prices from the Iran war oil shock will drive a jump in the headline inflation figure. A Reuters poll shows economists expect the annual rate of inflation to accelerate

articles.title: 88% in Anaheim poll say Ducks will beat Oilers, with attacking and goaltending leading the way
articles.description: There’s not yet joy in Ducksville, but there’s no shortage of optimism that the Anaheim Ducks can beat the Edmonton Oilers, and that they can do so with a combination of high-octane offensive hockey and brilliant goaltending.
